terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These Terms & Conditions (the "Terms") govern the use of the aitaxi.ge website and the ordering of digital services provided by AI NOW LLC (Georgian: შპს ეი აი ნაუ), registered in Georgia (the "Company", "we"). By using the aitaxi.ge website and/or ordering services, you (the "User", "Client") confirm that you have read, understood, and fully accept these Terms.
terms.section1Content:
1.1. These Terms constitute a public offer of the Company and define the rules for using the aitaxi.ge website and for the provision of services.

1.2. Using the website, submitting an inquiry, or paying for services means full and unconditional acceptance of these Terms.

1.3. If you do not agree with these Terms, please do not use the website and do not place an order.

1.4. These Terms apply together with the Privacy Policy (aitaxi.ge/privacy) and the Refund Policy (aitaxi.ge/refund), which form an integral part of them.
terms.section2Content:
Name: AI NOW LLC (შპს ეი აი ნაუ)
Identification code (ID): 406549070
Director: Andro Kasparovi
Legal address: 3 Tornike Eristavi St., Tbilisi, Georgia
Email: CONTACT@aiNOW.GE · ainowgeorgia@gmail.com
Phone: +995 599 70 15 52
Website: aitaxi.ge
terms.section3Content:
- Company ,  AI NOW LLC, providing services through the aitaxi.ge website.
- User / Client ,  a natural or legal person using the website or ordering services.
- Services ,  the Company's digital services listed in Section 4.
- Website ,  the aitaxi.ge website and all its pages.
- Contract ,  a separate agreement between the Company and the Client specifying the scope, timeline, and price of a particular project.
terms.section4Content:
4.1. The Company is an artificial intelligence and digital marketing agency. We provide the following services:

- Marketing ,  AI content, social media management, video, graphic design (posts, videos, banners, content plan).
- Development ,  websites, online stores, platforms, mobile applications.
- Automation ,  document processing, customer support, sales funnel, reporting.
- Chatbots ,  Telegram, WhatsApp, AI chatbot, support and sales bot.
- AI Characters ,  AI influencer, animated mascot.
- Consulting ,  AI readiness assessment, implementation roadmap, use cases.

4.2. The composition, scope, technical specifications, and price of each particular project are determined individually and fixed in a separate Contract between the Company and the Client.

4.3. Services are provided professionally and with reasonable diligence. Some deliverables may be created using artificial intelligence technologies.
terms.section5Content:
5.1. An inquiry submitted through the website form is preliminary and does not create a binding obligation for either party. It only begins a discussion of scope and price.

5.2. A formal relationship between the Company and the Client arises only after the terms are agreed and a separate Contract is signed, or after confirmed payment for the chosen service.

5.3. By paying for a service, the Client confirms that they are familiar with its description, price, and timeline.
terms.section6Content:
6.1. All prices are stated in the national currency of Georgia ,  the Lari (GEL, ₾).

6.2. Services are provided under two models:

- Monthly subscription (marketing packages, chatbots, etc.) ,  paid monthly;
- One-time payment (development of websites, online stores, platforms, etc.) ,  paid per project.

6.3. Current prices and package contents are published at aitaxi.ge/pricing. The final price of a particular project is fixed in the Contract.

6.4. The Company is not a VAT payer. Prices are stated without VAT; VAT is not charged.

6.5. Third-party costs (Meta/Google advertising budget, domain, hosting, licenses, paid fonts, stock materials) are not included in the cost of services and are paid separately unless otherwise stated in the Contract.
terms.section7Content:
7.1. Payment is accepted by bank card (Visa / Mastercard) through the secure payment system Flitt.

7.2. All transactions are processed on the bank's side over a secure connection. The Company does not receive or store your bank card data.

7.3. Payment is deemed completed from the moment confirmation is received from the bank's payment system.

7.4. After a successful payment, the Client receives a confirmation at the email address they provided.
terms.section8Content:
8.1. Approximate timelines for the main development services:

- Website ,  2, 3 weeks;
- Online store ,  3, 4 weeks;
- Platform / mobile application ,  4, 8 weeks.

8.2. Each development project includes 1 month of technical support after handover.

8.3. Monthly services (marketing, chatbots) are delivered continuously during the paid period.

8.4. The exact timeline of a particular project is agreed in the Contract. Timelines may be adjusted if the Client does not provide the required materials, access, or feedback in a timely manner.
terms.section9Content:
9.1. The refund procedure is fully described in the Refund Policy (aitaxi.ge/refund). In short:

- Full refund (100%) ,  if the order is cancelled before work begins; if the Company, through its own fault, failed to deliver the service on time; or in case of a technical or duplicate payment.
- Partial refund ,  for one-time projects that have started but are unfinished: completed and delivered stages are non-refundable, the cost of the unfinished part is refunded.
- Monthly subscriptions ,  cancellation is possible at any time; the current paid month runs to the end of the period and is non-refundable, and no further charges are made.
- Non-refundable ,  an already delivered and accepted digital product, a used subscription period, and third-party costs incurred.

9.2. A refund request is sent to CONTACT@aiNOW.GE and is reviewed within 5 business days. The refund is made to the same card; it may take the bank up to 30 calendar days to reflect the funds.
terms.section10Content:
10.1. All materials of the aitaxi.ge website (design, code, texts, graphics) are the intellectual property of the Company.

10.2. Rights to the deliverables of a particular project (source code, materials, content) are defined by a separate Contract and, as a rule, transfer to the Client after full payment.

10.3. Use of the website's materials without the Company's written permission is prohibited.
terms.section12Content:
12.1. The services and the website are provided on an "as is" basis. The Company does not guarantee the uninterrupted operation of the website.

12.2. The Company is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damage arising from the use of the website or services, nor for the actions of third parties.

12.3. The Company's maximum liability is limited to the amount actually paid by the Client for the relevant service, within the limits permitted by the legislation of Georgia.
terms.section13Content:
13.1. Under the Law of Georgia "On Protection of Consumer Rights", a consumer has the right to withdraw from a distance contract within 14 calendar days.

13.2. This right does not apply to a digital service whose performance has already begun with the consumer's prior consent. In that case, the refund provisions apply (Section 9 and the Refund Policy).
terms.section14Content:
14.1. Personal data is processed in accordance with the Law of Georgia "On Personal Data Protection" and is described in the Privacy Policy (aitaxi.ge/privacy).

14.2. By placing an order and using the website, the Client agrees to the processing of data under the terms of that policy.
terms.section15Content:
15.1. The Company may update these Terms at any time.

15.2. Changes take effect upon publication on the website. Continued use of the website or services after publication means agreement to the updated Terms.
terms.section16Content:
16.1. These Terms are governed by the legislation of Georgia, including the Civil Code of Georgia, the Law "On Electronic Commerce", and the Law "On Protection of Consumer Rights".

16.2. Any dispute is resolved through negotiation. If no agreement is reached, the dispute is considered in accordance with the legislation of Georgia in the courts of Tbilisi.
terms.section17Content:
AI NOW LLC (შპს ეი აი ნაუ)
Identification code (ID): 406549070
Address: 3 Tornike Eristavi St., Tbilisi, Georgia
Email: CONTACT@aiNOW.GE · ainowgeorgia@gmail.com
Phone: +995 599 70 15 52
Website: aitaxi.ge

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: AI NOW LLC ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the Law of Georgia on Personal Data Protection. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store, and share your information when you interact with us through our website (aitaxi.ge), Facebook Page, Instagram account, and any related messaging services.
privacy.section1Content:
We collect the following data when you use our website and services:

- **Contact information**: name, email address, phone number, company name
- **Project information**: idea descriptions submitted through the project inquiry form
- **Technical data**: IP address, browser type, device type, operating system, pages visited (via analytics)
- **Communication data**: messages exchanged during project collaboration
- **Messaging platform data**: messages, attachments, and profile information (such as name and profile picture) that you send to us via Facebook Messenger or Instagram Direct Messages
- **Usage data**: interaction history with our automated assistant, including timestamps and message content
privacy.section2Content:
Your data is used for:

- Scoping and quoting projects
- Communicating with you about our services
- Responding to your inquiries via our website, Facebook Messenger, and Instagram Direct Messages
- Providing automated AI-powered responses to common questions about our services
- Improving our website, services, and customer support quality
- Sending service-related notifications (not marketing, unless you opt in)
- Fulfilling legal and contractual obligations
privacy.section3Content:
When you communicate with us through Facebook Messenger or Instagram Direct Messages:

- We receive and process the messages you send us, including text, images, and attachments
- We may use your public profile information (name, profile picture) to personalize communication
- We use an AI-powered automated assistant to provide instant responses about our services, projects, and frequently asked questions
- Your messages may be stored on our servers for the purpose of providing continuous service and improving response quality
- We do not sell, rent, or share your messaging data with third parties for advertising purposes
- We comply with Meta Platform Terms and Policies regarding data collected through their platforms
- You can stop interacting with our messaging services at any time by blocking our page or sending a "stop" message
privacy.section4Content:
We use artificial intelligence to provide automated responses through our messaging channels:

- Our AI assistant answers questions about aiNOW services, pricing, project process, and general inquiries
- Conversations with the AI assistant may be reviewed by our team to improve service quality
- The AI assistant does not make binding commitments or enter into agreements on behalf of AI NOW LLC
- You may request to speak with a human representative at any time by typing "human" or "operator"
- AI-generated responses are clearly provided in the context of an automated service
privacy.section5Content:
We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with:

- **AI service providers** (for processing automated responses ,  data is sent securely and not used for training third-party models)
- **Meta Platforms, Inc.** (Facebook/Instagram messaging infrastructure ,  subject to Meta's Data Policy)
- **Email service providers** (for transactional emails)
- **Hosting providers** (for website and service operation)
- **Analytics providers** (anonymized usage data only)
- **Legal authorities** (when required by Georgian law)
privacy.section6Content:
We retain your data for the duration of our business relationship and as required by law:

- **Website form submissions**: kept for 2 years unless a partnership is established
- **Messaging conversations**: retained for up to 12 months for service improvement, then deleted
- **Project-related data**: retained for the duration of the project and 2 years after completion
- **Technical/analytics data**: retained for up to 12 months in anonymized form

You may request earlier deletion at any time (see Your Rights section).
privacy.section7Content:
Our website uses:

- **Essential cookies**: required for website functionality (session management)
- **Analytics cookies**: Google Analytics to understand how visitors use our site (anonymized)
- **Meta Pixel**: to measure the effectiveness of our Facebook and Instagram presence

You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling non-essential cookies will not affect your ability to use our website.
privacy.section8Content:
Under Georgian data protection law and applicable regulations, you have the right to:

- **Access** your personal data that we hold
- **Correct** inaccurate or incomplete data
- **Delete** your data ("right to be forgotten") ,  we will remove your data within 30 days of request
- **Object** to data processing
- **Withdraw consent** for messaging communications at any time
- **Data portability** ,  receive your data in a structured, commonly used format
- **Opt out** of automated AI responses at any time
- **File a complaint** with the State Inspector's Office (Personal Data Protection Service of Georgia)

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at CONTACT@aiNOW.GE.
privacy.section9Content: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If we become aware that we have collected data from a child under 18, we will delete it promptly. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us at CONTACT@aiNOW.GE.
privacy.section10Content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. If we make significant changes that affect how we handle your messaging data, we will notify you through our messaging channels or website. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

home.title: aiTAXI, Robotaxi Fleet Management for Taxi Companies
home.description: Robotaxi fleet management platform by aiNOW (Tbilisi, Georgia): dispatch, telemetry, remote assistance, depot operations and compliance for autonomous taxi fleets.

blog.title: Robotaxi Blog
blog.description: Guides and analysis on robotaxi technology, autonomous taxi economics, fleet operations and the Georgian taxi market, from the aiTAXI team.

about.title: About aiTAXI
about.description: Who builds aiTAXI: aiNOW, an AI company in Tbilisi, Georgia. The mission, the team and the pilot program for Georgian taxi fleets.

contact.title: Early Access and Contact
contact.description: Request early access to the aiTAXI robotaxi fleet management pilot or ask a question. Phone, email and office details.

landingFooter.tagline: Robotaxi fleet management platform by aiNOW (Tbilisi, Georgia). Early access for taxi operators.
landingFooter.copyright: © {year} aitaxi.ge, an aiNOW product. All rights reserved.

about.title: Building the fleet layer for autonomous taxis
about.mission: aiTAXI is an aiNOW product: a robotaxi fleet management platform that prepares Georgian taxi companies for the autonomous decade. The product is in early access, the research is public, and the pilot program is waiting for its first partners.
about.build1Desc: Dispatch, telemetry, remote assistance, depot operations and compliance in one console for autonomous taxi fleets.
about.build2Desc: Public research on robotaxi economics, safety and operations, in Georgian, English and Russian.
about.build3Desc: A pilot for Georgian taxi companies: the first integration, built together with the partner fleet.
about.value1Desc: The product status is stated plainly: early access, no invented case studies.
about.value2Desc: We build alongside existing taxi companies, not against them.
about.value3Desc: The research and analysis ship in the blog, for everyone.

hero.lead: When the car drives itself, the fleet still has to
hero.audience: For taxi companies and fleet operators
hero.sub: aiTAXI is a planned control board for orders, vehicle health, remote help and depot work. It is pre-launch, not an operating autonomous fleet.
hero.signedBy: aiNOW checks the fit with your operation, maps the pilot and shows the proposed workflow.
hero.commitment: aiTAXI has not launched. Early access starts with a practical review of your fleet and the systems it already uses.

work.s1Desc: The operator sees the pickup, destination and passenger requirement.
work.s2Desc: aiTAXI checks distance, battery and vehicle compatibility.
work.s3Desc: Before assignment, the operator sees the route and expected arrival time.
work.s4Desc: Vehicle position and safety signals appear on one screen.
work.s5Desc: A difficult case reaches an authorized operator with the full context.
work.s6Desc: The outcome, statuses and operator actions are stored in one record.

modules.heading: The daily work behind a driverless fleet
modules.subtitle: Each module starts with a task, shows what aiTAXI prepares, and ends with the decision your operator sees.
modules.prelaunch: aiTAXI is a pre-launch platform. These modules show the planned operating flow, not an operating fleet run by aiNOW.

dispatch.title: Send the right car
dispatch.task: A passenger request enters the queue.
dispatch.action: aiTAXI checks distance, charge, route and passenger needs.
dispatch.result: The operator sees the chosen car and pickup time before confirming.

telemetry.title: Spot a problem early
telemetry.task: A battery or sensor reading leaves the safe range.
telemetry.action: aiTAXI pauses new rides for that car and suggests a checked replacement.
telemetry.result: The operator sees what changed and which car can continue the ride.

remote.title: Help a stopped car
remote.task: A car cannot safely continue on its own.
remote.action: aiTAXI sends the case to an authorised operator with the route and camera context.
remote.result: The operator helps through the difficult section and records the decision.

depot.title: Prepare the fleet before the rush
depot.task: Cars need charging, cleaning or maintenance before demand rises.
depot.action: aiTAXI places each job in the quietest available time window.
depot.result: The operator sees which cars will be ready for the next peak.

safety.title: Keep one clear record
safety.task: An incident needs a complete, reviewable record.
safety.action: aiTAXI brings together the trip, vehicle readings and operator actions.
safety.result: The operator reviews one report before it is shared.

demos.heading: Watch the fleet make the next safe move
demos.subtitle: Each scenario follows one operating rhythm: a problem appears, aiTAXI coordinates the response, and the fleet returns to a clear service state.
demos.disclaimer: Pre-launch simulation. These scenarios show intended platform behaviour, not a real-world aiTAXI fleet.

dispatch.title: Match a ride without a driver handoff
dispatch.description: The platform checks proximity, charge and accessibility before assignment.
dispatch.problem: Ride request: Rustaveli Avenue to Vake, with wheelchair space required.
dispatch.aiAction: AV-12 is the nearest compatible vehicle. Route set; pickup ETA is 4 minutes.
dispatch.result: AV-12 reached the pickup point and the passenger pickup is confirmed.

telemetry.title: From warning to safe replacement
telemetry.description: A vehicle stops taking rides when battery or sensor readings leave the safe range.
telemetry.problem: AV-08 battery fell to 18% and a sensor warning was raised.
telemetry.aiAction: AV-08 was removed from service; the ride moved to fully checked AV-14.
telemetry.result: A safe vehicle took the ride and overall service coverage held.

depot.title: Ready before demand peaks
depot.description: aiTAXI places depot work inside the quiet demand window.
depot.problem: The forecast shows a 17:00 demand peak; three vehicles need attention first.
depot.aiAction: Charging, cleaning and maintenance were placed in the 01:00–05:00 quiet window.
depot.result: All three vehicles are ready by 17:00, leaving the full fleet available for the peak.

compliance.title: From incident to regulator report
compliance.description: aiTAXI joins incident evidence into one traceable record.
compliance.problem: INC-024 was recorded; its evidence sits across separate operating logs.
compliance.aiAction: aiTAXI links the telemetry, route, camera reference and operator actions.
compliance.result: A report with the full timeline and all four source references is ready for the regulator.

hybrid.title: One queue, two kinds of vehicle
hybrid.description: aiTAXI assigns one queue across human-driven and autonomous vehicles.
hybrid.problem: Four evening requests are queued; the autonomous pilot covers only one zone.
hybrid.aiAction: The system assigns rides across human-driven and autonomous cars, extending AV coverage to a second zone.
hybrid.result: The pilot covers a second zone while the other requests remain assigned.

how.heading: From a human fleet to a hybrid one
how.subtitle: aiTAXI is built to slot into an existing taxi company, not replace it.

audit.title: Fleet audit
audit.desc: aiNOW maps your zones, demand, dispatch process and the first realistic pilot use case.

integrate.title: Integration
integrate.desc: aiNOW defines how aiTAXI would connect to your dispatch system and a future vehicle partner.

operate.title: Operation
operate.desc: The planned console keeps orders, vehicle status, remote help and depot work on one screen.

roadmap.heading: Where aiTAXI is today
roadmap.subtitle: The platform is pre-launch and this page says so plainly: the research is public, the pilot program is open, deployment follows the first AV partners in Georgia.

now.title: Research and pilot recruiting
now.desc: aiNOW is documenting the operating model and reviewing possible pilot partners in Georgia.

next.title: Pilot deployment
next.desc: A partner pilot would test dispatch and vehicle-status workflows before any wider rollout.

later.title: Scale across the region
later.desc: A wider rollout is considered only after a safe pilot and suitable vehicles become available.

faq.subtitle: What is available now, what is a concept, and where the safety boundary is.
faq.a1: aiTAXI is aiNOW's concept and operations platform direction for taxi fleets: ride dispatch, fleet control, charging, depot planning, and safety logs.
faq.a2: No. This page does not sell a live taxi service. It shows how fleet operations can be prepared when vehicles, regulation, and operators are ready.
faq.q3: Does it drive autonomous cars today?
faq.a3: aiNOW does not claim to operate driverless cars in the city today. The page describes software logic for fleet planning and supervision.
faq.a4: Dispatch, booking, depot schedules, operator panels, and reporting can be planned now. Telemetry is added only for vehicles that provide the required data.
faq.q5: What result does a fleet owner get?
faq.a5: A fleet owner gets a staged plan: what can be automated now, what needs vehicle data, and what stays under human control.
faq.a6: No. aiTAXI is pre-launch. aiNOW is reviewing pilot fit; production use would require a fleet partner, a vehicle platform and separate safety approval.
faq.a7: There is no standard price yet. aiNOW first reviews fleet size, required connections and pilot scope, then provides written terms.
faq.a8: aiTAXI does not promise a launch date. The timing depends on vehicles, regulation and a qualified operating partner in Georgia.
faq.q9: Which autonomous vehicle platforms does aiTAXI support?
faq.a9: aiTAXI is vehicle-agnostic by design: integration targets the AV platforms that enter the Georgian market. The pilot defines the first integration together with the partner fleet.
faq.a10: aiTAXI is built by aiNOW, an AI company in Tbilisi. aiNOW builds AI systems for Georgian businesses: chatbots, automation and content platforms.

cta.heading: Join the aiTAXI pilot
cta.subtitle: Leave a phone number. aiNOW will contact you in Georgian, English or Russian to review pilot fit.
cta.phoneNote: No spam. One call to qualify the pilot.

capabilities.title: Five fleet jobs in one clear system.
capabilities.intro: This is a pre-launch capability plan, not a live autonomous fleet. Real use requires vehicle data, an operator, and separate safety approval.

dispatch.title: Ride assignment
dispatch.description: aiTAXI checks distance, charge, and accessibility and selects a compatible vehicle.
dispatch.result: The operator sees the assigned vehicle and route on one screen.

telemetry.title: Vehicle condition
telemetry.description: Charge, sensors, doors, and alerts are collected into one vehicle state.
telemetry.result: The operator sees a problem before the next ride is assigned.

assistance.title: Operator assistance
assistance.description: If a vehicle cannot resolve a situation, the planned workflow brings in an operator with the required context.
assistance.result: A difficult case does not remain without oversight.

depot.title: Charging and depot work
depot.description: Charging, cleaning, and service are planned during quieter demand periods.
depot.result: More vehicles are ready when demand rises.

safety.title: Safety record
safety.description: The route, telemetry, alerts, and operator actions are joined in one record.
safety.result: The timeline needed to review an incident stays in one place.

heroStory.input: From Rustaveli Avenue to Vake. Wheelchair space required.
heroStory.detailTwo: Route is visible to the operator
heroStory.result: Vehicle assigned. Pickup status is visible on one screen.
heroStory.businessValue: The right vehicle and full control on one screen.

proof.assistNote: Car 7 stopped for a delivery van. No driver in it. An operator takes the wheel from the depot.
proof.note: Pre-launch example. It shows the intended workflow, not a real-world aiNOW fleet.

wordmark.line: Orders, vehicle status and operator decisions on one clear board.

seo.title: aiTAXI: planned operations platform for taxi fleets
seo.description: A pre-launch aiNOW platform for dispatch, vehicle status, remote help and depot planning. Pilot-fit reviews are open for Georgian taxi companies.
